title: Taking Care of a Sick Friend
content: When Lily’s best friend caught a serious flu, Lily decided to help however she could. After work, she visited the pharmacy to buy medicine, soup, and several small groceries. She spent the evening cleaning the apartment, preparing tea, and making sure her friend was comfortable enough to rest properly. Although the situation was tiring after long workdays, Lily did not mind the extra effort. Her friend repeatedly apologized for being a burden, but Lily reminded her that good friendships involved helping each other during difficult moments. By the end of the week, her friend finally started feeling better, and both of them appreciated their friendship even more.
